info.title: Fantasy Economy RPG API
info.description: REST API under /api/v1. Shared Zod schemas are the contract.

post.summary: Register a new account (active immediately)
Log in with email and password
Log out and invalidate the current session
Change password and rotate the session token
Revoke every session except the current one
Create the account character (one per account)

get.summary: All quests with this character state and progress

post.summary: Accept a quest (progress starts only from acceptance)
Claim rewards for a completed quest (exactly once)
Start traveling to a directly connected destination

get.summary: Current travel status (lazily finalizes expired travel)
Local features available at the current location
Directly connected destinations from the current location
Inventory: slot usage, stacks, and unique items

post.summary: Equip an owned, unlocked item instance
Unequip a slot back into inventory (requires a free slot)
Rest at the local inn: full HP/MP for a level-scaled fee

get.summary: NPC shops at the current location

post.summary: Buy from a stock entry (atomic, race-safe, idempotent)
Open your shop, registered to a region

patch.summary: Update your shop name or description

get.summary: Regions a shop may register to

post.summary: List an asset for whole-listing sale (marketplace location only)

delete.summary: Cancel your active listing (asset returns to inventory)

post.summary: Buy a whole listing (marketplace location only)

get.summary: Market summary for an item (median needs 5+ recent sales)
Gathering actions at the current location + skill progress

post.summary: Start a timed run (reward pre-rolled server-side, never exposed)
Place a capacity-held reward into inventory (exactly once)

get.summary: Recipes at the current location + profession progress

post.summary: Start a timed run (inputs + Gold consumed atomically, once)
Collect a capacity-held output (exactly once)

get.summary: Encounters at the current location + any active combat

post.summary: Start a persisted server-authoritative combat
Resolve one command (locked, versioned, idempotent-safe)

get.summary: Museum collections with this character donation progress

post.summary: Donate an eligible artifact (atomic, first copy only, irreversible)
